_comment: Copy to secrets.local.json (GITIGNORED) and fill in real values. NEVER commit secrets.local.json. Keys may also be supplied via ~/.claude/servers/llm-Keys.env (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY).
_openai_compat_note: Open-weights models (Llama/Qwen/Mistral/...) run through any OpenAI-compatible server. Point base_url at your vLLM/Ollama/TGI/LM Studio endpoint. api_key can be a dummy for local servers.
_live_mode_note: Only needed for --mode live. mock mode needs none of these.
